description: Page Two THE AUGUSTA COURIER He who spares no class of men is angry at no person but the vices of all Published Weekly by The Courier Publishing Company 1007 Southern Finance Building Augusta Georgia Entered as SecondClass Matter at the Post Office at Augusta Georgia SUBSCRIPTION RATES One year 200 Six months 125 I ARNALLS COMMENTS ON SALES TAX UNFORTUNATE From The Atlanta Journal August 8 1951 WHATEVER Ellis Amall former governor of Georgia has to say about politics is interesting provocative and worthy of careful study The fact that Mr Arnall had observed a Jong public silence on political matters lent particular interest to his speech this week at Emory University It should be emphasized however to any who may be unfamiliar with the Georgia scene at this time that former Governor Arnall made no claims to be speaking for anybody but himself Those who have supported him in the past will reserve the right to agree or differ with his current and future positions as they deem best for the state On the sales tax issue especially it seems unfortunate to us that Mr Arnall should denounce this new measure before it has had a chance to
